deck.title: Engineering
deck.tagline: Four modules. Architecture to roadmap. Select a topic to explore.
deck.introSubtitle: From monolith to modular design system

system-architecture.title: System Architecture
system-architecture.subtitle: Four-layer design system with registry-based rendering.
system-architecture.headline: Layered Architecture

cards.title: Design Tokens
cards.body: Palette, spacing, typography, timing, shadows, and borders. The atomic constants that every layer above consumes. Zero runtime logic — pure configuration.

cards.title: Components
cards.body: Reusable UI primitives: cards, badges, buttons, context providers. Each is theme-aware via useTheme/useChrome hooks. Single responsibility, composable.

cards.title: Layouts
cards.body: 26 registered slide renderers across 6 families. O(1) registry lookup by layout ID. Each layout receives a topic data contract and renders autonomously.

cards.title: Patterns
cards.body: Deck schemas, transcription functions, and composition rules. Patterns orchestrate how layouts combine into coherent presentation decks.

data-pipeline.title: Rendering Pipeline
data-pipeline.subtitle: From URL parameter to painted pixels — the full data flow.
data-pipeline.headline: Data Flow Pipeline

cards.title: URL Params
cards.body: ?app=v14&deck=engineering selects the registry-based renderer and deck key.

cards.title: Deck Factory
cards.body: createDeckPreset() normalizes slides: assigns icons from LAYOUT_ICONS, resolves colors, fills default arrays.

cards.title: Theme Resolution
cards.body: resolveTopicColors() maps each slide's palette through the active theme. Immutable — returns new objects.

cards.title: Layout Lookup
cards.body: LayoutRenderer calls layoutRegistry.get(layout) — O(1) Map lookup. Passes topic={slide} as props.

cards.title: Paint
cards.body: Layout component renders with useTheme/useChrome context. Entrance animations stagger via CSS transitions.

tech-evolution.title: Technology Evolution
tech-evolution.subtitle: How the platform evolved from monolith to modular design system.
tech-evolution.headline: Platform Evolution Timeline

cards.title: v10 — Monolith
cards.body: Single 3,087-line JSX file. 25-case switch statement for rendering. Inline styles, no shared tokens.

cards.title: v11 — Content Extraction
cards.body: Deck manifests moved to content/ modules. Data separated from rendering logic.

cards.title: v12 — Theme System
cards.body: Centralized palette and typography tokens. ThemeContext introduced. Style modes added.

cards.title: v13 — Layout Families
cards.body: Verge Pop, onboarding, handbook families created. Still wired via monolith switch.

cards.title: v14 — Registry Architecture
cards.body: Layout registry with O(1) lookup. Strangler Fig migration. 26 layouts, 6 families, 768-line App shell.

implementation-roadmap.title: Implementation Roadmap
implementation-roadmap.subtitle: Seven-phase Strangler Fig migration from monolith to design system.
implementation-roadmap.headline: Migration Roadmap

cards.title: Phase 1: Tokens
cards.body: Extract palette, spacing, typography, timing, shadows, borders into src/tokens/. Add TypeScript config.

cards.title: Phase 2: Components
cards.body: Extract 15 reusable components into 6 category directories. Create context providers and hooks.

cards.title: Phase 3: Base Layouts
cards.body: Build LayoutRenderer + registry. Register base (6) and verge-pop (6) layout families.

cards.title: Phase 4: Extended Layouts
cards.body: Register sprint (1), onboarding (7), and handbook (5) layout families.

cards.title: Phase 5: App Shell
cards.body: Create App.v14.jsx — 768-line registry-based renderer replacing 25-case switch.

cards.title: Phase 6: Engineering
cards.body: 4 new engineering-specific layouts: architecture, code-flow, tech-stack, roadmap.

cards.title: Phase 7: Integration
cards.body: Engineering deck manifest, TypeScript validation, build verification, ADR documentation.

talkingPoints: Strangler Fig pattern: new system runs alongside monolith, selected via ?app=v14
Zero regressions: existing decks continue to work on all prior app versions
Side-effect registration: import register-all.js populates the entire layout registry
Each phase was independently committable and buildable
